ORDER TO TRANSFER CASE / ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE (TO SANTA CLARA SUPERIOR COURT - ALL COST OF FEES TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFFS DOUGLAS D. STURGEON AND DOUGLAS L. STURGEON)

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE, THE COURT ADOPTS THE TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS. DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY'S MOTION TO CHANGE VENUE IS GRANTED. THE CASE IS TRANSFERRED TO SANTA CLARA SUPERIOR COURT AND ALL COSTS OF TRANSFER ARE TO BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF DOUGLAS STURGEON. PER CCP 395(B), SAN FRANCISCO IS NOT A PROPER VENUE FOR THIS CASE. FORD MAY NOT HAVE THIS CASE TRANSFERRED TO SOLANO COUNTY SINCE THAT COUNTY IS NOT WHERE IT HAS ITS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA. SINCE SANTA CLARA COUNTY IS WHERE FORD HAS DESIGNATED AS ITS PRINCIPAL PLACE OF BUSINESS IN CALIFORNIA, FORD'S ALTERNATIVE REQUEST FOR TRANSFER TO THAT COUNTY IS GRANTED. ORDER IS SIGNED. (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS). JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: M.GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, TORREANOM@AOL.COM, REPORTED. (302/HK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-30-2018 Off Calendar

Defendant Ford Motor Company'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue
Off Calendar Jun-14-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT FORD MOTOR COMPANY's Motion To Change Venue.

Defendant Ford Motor Company's motion to change venue is granted. The case is transferred to Santa Clara Superior Court and all costs of transfer are to be paid by plaintiff Douglas Sturgeon. Per CCP 395(b), San Francisco is not a proper venue for this case. Ford may not have this case transferred to Solano County since that county is not where it has its principal place of business in California. Since Santa Clara County is where Ford has designated as its principal place of business in California, Ford's alternative request for transfer to that county is granted.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M.Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. =(302/HK)
